nodes.name: Settings UI Patterns Skill
nodes.description: Patterns for creating or redesigning Settings pages, informational panels, and configuration interfaces in OpenChamber

nodes.name: Canonical Settings Look (2026)
nodes.description: Flat hierarchy, no unnecessary wrappers or section titles, compact controls, left-leading state icon, subtle inactive contrast, minimal row chrome

nodes.name: Settings Typography Hierarchy
nodes.description: Page title font-semibold, section header font-medium, control group font-medium/normal, option labels non-bold, helper text typography-meta text-muted-foreground

nodes.name: Settings Structural Patterns
nodes.description: Segmented option buttons, radio option lists, checkbox rows, invisible two-column alignment, theme row composition, numeric stepper controls, template grids, icon/color picker rows

nodes.name: Settings Search Integration
nodes.description: Explicit search registry in packages/ui/src/lib/settings/search.ts with data-settings-item anchors, metadata.ts for page metadata, keyword synonyms, and availability guards
